title: Bank of Baroda Credit Card Funnel
description: Lead recovery workflow for the Bank of Baroda credit card journey.

policies.description: Calls are allowed during business hours only.

stages.title: Mobile Verification
stages.goal: Verify the customer mobile number and OTP.

customerObjections.title: Did not receive OTP
customerObjections.description: Customer did not receive or could not access the OTP.
customerObjections.handlingScript: Guide the customer to request a fresh OTP.

stages.title: Personal Details
stages.goal: Collect name, age, gender, and related details.
stages.description: Customer should complete the personal details form.

systemObjections.title: PAN detail mismatch
systemObjections.description: System validation failed because PAN data does not match the entered details.
systemObjections.handlingScript: Help the customer verify PAN inputs and retry.
